full_text:
Jiang Shi 蔣石
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiang Shi (蔣石)was born in Xiping/Jincheng. Local leader, sent Han Sui’s head to Cao Cao. May have killed Han Sui.
